channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Raul Castro's grandson in Havana, US and Cuban officials say
item.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.
item.content:encoded:
CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Pope decries rise of AI-directed warfare, saying it leads to a spiral of annihilation
item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced how investments in artificial intelligence and high-tech weaponry were leading the world into a "spiral of annihilation," as he called for peace in the Middle East and Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV denounced how investments in artificial intelligence and high-tech weaponry were leading the world into a "spiral of annihilation," as he called for peace in the Middle East and Ukraine.

(Image credit: Gregorio Borgia)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Tensions flare near Strait of Hormuz as a ship is seized and another is sunk
item.description: Tensions are escalating again near the Strait of Hormuz after a ship anchored off the United Arab Emirates was seized and taken toward Iran and another was attacked and sank near the coast of Oman.
item.content:encoded:
Tensions are escalating again near the Strait of Hormuz after a ship anchored off the United Arab Emirates was seized and taken toward Iran and another was attacked and sank near the coast of Oman.

(Image credit: Digital Embed)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Native kids with disabilities were held in wooden boxes. Sweeping reforms are coming
item.description: State officials in New York say the Salmon River district's special education program confined young children with disabilities in wooden boxes. Parents weren't notified.
item.content:encoded:
State officials in New York say the Salmon River district's special education program confined young children with disabilities in wooden boxes. Parents weren't notified.

(Image credit: Used with permision)
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: The Supreme Court keeps abortion pill mifepristone available by telehealth
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled on Thursday that the abortion pill mifepristone can continue to be prescribed online or over the phone and sent through the mail.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court ruled on Thursday that the abortion pill mifepristone can continue to be prescribed online or over the phone and sent through the mail.

(Image credit: Jose Luis Magana)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: Linda McMahon defends dismantling the Education Department, shifting its work
item.description: The education secretary faced questions about the shrinking of her agency, limits on federal student loan borrowing and oversight of the education of students with disabilities.
item.content:encoded:
The education secretary faced questions about the shrinking of her agency, limits on federal student loan borrowing and oversight of the education of students with disabilities.

(Image credit: Eric Lee)
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner

item.title: Cuba's power grid collapses and plunges eastern provinces into a major blackout
item.description: Cuba's aging power grid has eroded in recent years as it faces a prolonged economic crisis, made worse by a U.S. energy blockade of the island.
item.content:encoded:
Cuba's aging power grid has eroded in recent years as it faces a prolonged economic crisis, made worse by a U.S. energy blockade of the island.

(Image credit: Ramon Espinosa)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Michael Jackson's biopic has pushed his music up the Billboard charts
item.description: The commercial impact of the Michael Jackson biopic Michael is reaching well beyond the global box office.
item.content:encoded:
The commercial impact of the Michael Jackson biopic Michael is reaching well beyond the global box office.

(Image credit: KMazur/WireImage)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: Jury orders Boeing to pay $49.5 million to family of 737 MAX crash victim
item.description: A federal jury in Chicago awarded $49.5 million to the family of Samya Stumo, a young woman who was killed in the second of two Boeing 737 MAX crashes within months of each other in 2018 and 2019.
item.content:encoded:
A federal jury in Chicago awarded $49.5 million to the family of Samya Stumo, a young woman who was killed in the second of two Boeing 737 MAX crashes within months of each other in 2018 and 2019.

(Image credit: Stumo Family)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Shakira, Madonna and BTS will headline World Cup final halftime show
item.description: For the first time ever, the final match will feature a halftime performance of three acts capturing this year's global spotlight.
item.content:encoded:
For the first time ever, the final match will feature a halftime performance of three acts capturing this year's global spotlight.

(Image credit: John Nacion/Billboard via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Isabella Gomez Sarmiento
